description: A personal story of how Binance provided financial support during a crisis after a devastating earthquake in Turkey.
topic_summary: The speaker shares their experience with Binance, highlighting its role in providing financial aid of $100 to victims and $300 to their family after losing everything in the earthquake [t=32:56]. They emphasize the community aspect of Binance, describing it as more than just an exchange, but as friends and family [t=43.84].
